title: Translate a loop to vectorized form
description: Convert a slow row-wise loop into vectorized or apply-family code while preserving results.
body: Steps: 1. Capture the loop's output and a benchmark as the baseline. 2. Identify whether each iteration is independent or carries state. 3. Replace independent element work with vectorized ops or vapply/map with a fixed return type. 4. Handle NA and edge cases the loop handled implicitly. 5. Compare output element-by-element against the baseline and re-benchmark. Rollback point: before deleting the original loop. Validation: identical output and a measurable speedup.
